claims.summary: The 48D lane and 0.85 smoothstep gate are active source mechanics.
claims.disposition: Verified dimensional ownership, exact gate behavior, and smooth onset regressions.

claims.summary: Sustained high entropy may smear rather than distinguish tail features.
claims.disposition: Verified bounded extreme-entropy noise dampening, density-gradient shaping, and tail-only headroom; these mechanics do not establish felt distinction.

claims.summary: High-versus-low entropy and emotional-versus-narrative lane behavior should be compared.
claims.disposition: Route a capture-first representation and Concordance comparison with exact codec loss receipts.

claims.summary: Retuning the gate, clamp, pressure relation, or dampening changes live codec output.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 operator approval wait.
